summary: Excellent matrix recording with a superb sound that captures the set ending on Playin' in the Band and opening the next with Tennessee Jed
review: Reviewers praise the audio quality, calling it "what a sound!" which suggests an excellent matrix source. Apart from basic set‑list information (Playin' in the Band and Tennessee Jed), there are no specific comments on performance, so the musical side remains neutral.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong positive comment on sound quality (5‑star) outweighs limited information about the performance; with only two reviews, confidence is moderate.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer exclaims "what a sound!" indicating clear, well‑balanced audio despite no detailed technical description.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Set 2 ends with Playin' in the Band; Set 3 opens with Tennessee Jed (no performance commentary).
